login.title: Welcome Back!
login.description: Sign in with your account to continue.

errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address

magic_link.title: Verification Successful
magic_link.description: Your magic link has been verified. You are now signed in and can access your account.

help.title: Help & Support

email_access.title: I can't access my E-Mail address.
email_access.description_before_link: If you can't access your E-Mail address connected to your account, please contact us via the contact form
email_access.description_after_link: . Please also contact us, if you have another email address you'd like to connect to your account.

unknown_error.title: Unknown error occurred.
unknown_error.description_before_link: In this case, please try again later or, if this issue keeps occurring, please contact us via the contact form
unknown_error.description_after_link: . Copy your request ID from the error message and include it in your message to us, so we can investigate the issue.

passkey.title: I can't access my passkey.
passkey.description_before_link: In this case, please try again later or, if this issue keeps occurring, please contact us via the contact form
passkey.description_after_link: . Copy your request ID from the error message and include it in your message to us, so we can investigate the issue.

email_delivery.title: Haven't received an E-Mail.
email_delivery.description_before_link: Please try again later, if no error occurs, please take a look into your spam folder or contact us
email_delivery.description_after_link: . In order to help you, you need to provide us your email.

two_factor.title: Lost my 2FA device or backup codes.
two_factor.description_before_link: If you've lost your 2FA device (e.g. you can't access your authenticator app), please use your backup codes. If you also lost them, you need to
two_factor.description_after_link: . You may need to provide proof of identity, so we can verify that you are the rightful owner of the account. After successful verification, we can help you regain access to your account.

help.still_questions_before_link: Still have questions? Please contact us via the contact form

contact.title: Contact Us

problems.email_access: I can't access my E-Mail address.
problems.two_factor: Lost my 2FA device or backup codes.

register_success.title: Account Created Successfully
register_success.description: Everything went alright. Your Selfmail account has been created and is ready for the next authentication step.

login_success.title: Magic Link Sent
login_success.description: We have sent a magic link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to log in.

otp.title: Enter OTP Code
otp.description: You have an authenticator app connected to your account. Please enter the 6-digit code from your app to verify your identity and access your account.

otp_backup.title: Use Backup Code
otp_backup.description: Enter one of your saved backup codes to continue signing in if you no longer have access to your authenticator app.
